notes: Token prices are per 1,000,000 tokens unless a model price object states another unit.
Official pages can change without versioned release notes; refresh this file from the listed sources before billing-critical use.
Root currency is mixed after adding CNY-denominated Chinese cloud/platform pricing; each provider section declares currency and unit overrides.
Prices are copied from official pages. Do not normalize currencies unless a downstream billing layer supplies an exchange rate.
When an official page lists only plan entitlements or omits token pricing, the section stores notes or non-token plan prices instead of inferred token prices.
OpenAI image-generation pricing stores modality-specific text and image token prices; downstream billing must use the usage modality details when the API returns them.
OpenAI image-generation per-image estimates are copied as operator guidance only; they do not override token-level settlement when usage details are available.
Columns are input, cached_input, and output token prices.
For gpt-5.5, gpt-5.5-pro, gpt-5.4, and gpt-5.4-pro, prompts with more than 272K input tokens have long-context pricing; see long_context_pricing.
Regional processing/data-residency endpoints have a 10% uplift for gpt-5.5, gpt-5.5-pro, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.4-nano, and gpt-5.4-pro.
For image generation cost estimates, OpenAI directs users to the calculator in the image generation guide.
per_image_estimates records official common-size output estimates in USD per image. Text input and edit/reference image input tokens still need to be added for final cost estimates.

per_image_estimates.source_note: Official guide examples for 1024x1024, 1024x1536, and 1536x1024; gpt-image-2 supports additional valid sizes.

web_search_preview_reasoning_models.note: Search content tokens billed at model rates.

notes: Cache write/read prices are prompt caching prices.
Batch API is 50% off standard input and output token pricing.
Claude API US-only data residency via inference_geo has a 1.1x multiplier for Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, and newer models.
Gemini Developer API pricing distinguishes Free and Paid tiers; numeric prices below are Paid tier prices.
For Gemini 3.1 Pro and Gemini 2.5 Pro, long context prices apply to prompts above 200K tokens.
Batch and Flex prices are included where the official table lists them.

google_search_gemini_2_5.free_allowance: 1500 RPD shared for Flash and Flash-Lite

file_search.note: Charged for embeddings at $0.15 / 1M tokens; retrieved document tokens are charged as regular model tokens.

notes: Google Cloud now presents Vertex/Generative AI pricing under Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform.
For current Gemini 3 and Gemini 2.5 Google models, listed prices match the Google Cloud tables. Cloud SKUs may vary by currency and region.
This section intentionally stores the Google-model subset used by the vertex model list; see the source page for partner-model regional tables.

xai.batch_discount: 20%-50% off standard token rates for text and language models

mistral-small-latest.note: Official pricing page also contains an older Mistral Small 3.2 card for the same endpoint at $0.10 input and $0.30 output; current Mistral Small 4 card is recorded.

codestral-latest.note: Pricing card lists output price only.

command-r-plus-08-2024.source_note: Official pricing FAQ lists Command R+ 08-2024 at $2.50 input and $10 output per 1M tokens.

notes: Cohere docs state generative models are per-token, embeddings per token, and rerank per search; pricing page values are recorded where extractable from official page data.

qwen3.6-flash.batch_discount: 50% of realtime inference price where Batch is supported

music-2.6.note: Free for two weeks per official page.
